name: Creamy Cranberry Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
Combine water and unflavored gelatin in a small saucepan. Stir until the gelatin dissolves.
In a separate bowl, mix 1 cup of cranberry juice cocktail with the dissolved gelatin. Add fresh cranberries and aspartame sweetener. Stir to combine.
Pour this mixture into a metal tray or pan and place it in the freezer until the edges form crystals (about 30 minutes).
Remove from the freezer and stir gently until creamy. Return to the freezer for another hour, stirring occasionally.
Serves: 8
Nutrition: 1 serving = 1 fruit exchange, 42 calories
(Note: Plastic 3/4 cup size yogurt containers are good for dividing frozen desserts in equal portions.)
